messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Say hello world in a Node app with a single endpoint
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Say hello world in a Node app with a single endpoint",
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down functional decomposition: initialize project, add dependencies, implement application code (single endpoint), configure start script, verify behavior by testing locally, and document usage. Each step is sequential and depends on the prior completion of setup and implementation tasks.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "setup-project",
      "title": "Initialize Node project",
      "description": "Create project folder and initialize Node package.json (e.g., npm init -y) so the project has basic metadata.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A package.json file exists in the project root with project name and default fields."
    },
    {
      "id": "install-dependencies",
      "title": "Install Express dependency",
      "description": "Install the Express package (or chosen minimal HTTP framework) and save it to package.json dependencies.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Express (or chosen framework) appears under dependencies in package.json and node_modules contains the package."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-app-file",
      "title": "Create application file with single endpoint",
      "description": "Create app.js (or index.js) that starts a server and exposes one GET endpoint (e.g., GET /) returning the text 'Hello World'.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "install-dependencies"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "app.js exists and defines an HTTP server with a single endpoint that sends 'Hello World' when requested."
    },
    {
      "id": "add-start-script",
      "title": "Add npm start script",
      "description": "Add a start script to package.json (e.g., \"start\": \"node app.js\") so the app can be started with npm start.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "package.json includes a scripts.start entry that runs the application file (node app.js)."
    },
    {
      "id": "test-endpoint-locally",
      "title": "Run and test the endpoint",
      "description": "Start the server and perform a local HTTP request (curl or browser) to verify the endpoint returns 'Hello World' and status 200.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "create-app-file",
        "install-dependencies",
        "add-start-script"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "A request to the app root returns HTTP 200 and the response body equals 'Hello World'."
    },
    {
      "id": "document-readme",
      "title": "Add README with run instructions",
      "description": "Create README.md containing install and run instructions plus an example curl command and expected 'Hello World' output.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "test-endpoint-locally"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README.md exists and documents installation, start command, and an example request/response demonstrating 'Hello World'."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 6
}
